subsystems.name: EftMovementController
subsystems.responsibility: Manage base HU/s translation, charge acceleration curve, and wall collision dampening.

subsystems.name: ChargeStateSystem
subsystems.responsibility: Evaluate speed (>300), grounding, and air state to flag entities as 'Dangerous'.

subsystems.name: KnockdownStateSystem
subsystems.responsibility: Immobilize players, prevent inputs, and manage recovery/immunity timers.

subsystems.name: CombatResolutionSystem
subsystems.responsibility: Calculate head-on velocity vectors or apply punch cross-counter timing.

subsystems.name: PossessionSystem
subsystems.responsibility: Detect carrier vs loose ball. Strip speed globally when possessing.

subsystems.name: BallEntity
subsystems.responsibility: Manage physical state (held vs loose) and trigger fumbles based on mass/velocity.

subsystems.name: ArenaValidatorSystem
subsystems.responsibility: Reset bounds, goal zones, hazards, and clock suppression.
